text_block_list.text:
On a certain day before the end 
of the summer camp…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu……! Gee～ I ran a ton today, I ran a ton…!

text_block_list.name: $(scale 55)Elegant Chestnut-Haired Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Good work today Miss Stego, Miss McQueen. 
I have prepared towels and water.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～ Thanks so much, you can just pop them right there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
…I believe we have surpassed our training 
expectations for this summer, and are 
prepared for whatever may come. 
However…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
There's no time for festivities. It's like how 
you've shown me before in the past… 
The scenery after summer is that of a 
completely different beast.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Fufu, if those are your wishes, then shall we devote ourselves to training with our remaining days?
—I've been looking for you, Stego!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh～ Fukukitaru. What's up? You're all glittery.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes indeed! Glitter, glitter, sparkle, 
sparkle, dazzle, dazzle indeed! Such 
is my declaration!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's the Kikuka Sho! This very up and 
coming Matikanefukukitaru shall at 
this very moment declare her victory 
against you, Stego!!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so was it one of your divinations that 
brought upon this "battle declaration"?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yayaa!? H-How did you!? That's Stego for you… Truly a cunning one…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hahahah. Nah, well, I'm actually thankful for this. To receive a declaration like this from you ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Sure, Fukukitaru, the battle is on. Let's 
compete neck-to-neck in your tip-top 
condition.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I did it! To think Stego would even accept 
my declaration, I can feel my fortunes 
are exploding sky high right now!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let us meet again! I am so very looking 
forward to our Kikuka Sho!!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah, she swept away like a storm clearing up……

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Well, you're not wrong about there actually being a "storm" on the horizon.

…Just like that, the summer camp ended 
with no issues, and as we approached 
the Kikuka Sho ——
——An omen revealed itself.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …The rain's gotten kinda heavy hey.
choice_data_list: Should we finish up for the day?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ahh, nah. Let me run for a little longer. I still haven't gotten my fill for the day yet ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Is that ——

As I turned my head to follow 
Stay Gold's gaze ——

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Haa, Haa, Haa ——

Unfazed by the rain nor the wind, 
she ran with the same vigor as if it 
was an actual race ——

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: More… More, more, more…!

Even though I thought she was already 
at top speed, somehow she accelerated 
even further, leaving me utterly breathless 
watching her in the moment.

If she was able to pull off that kind of 
technique in an actual race, then it 
would be a phenomenal event for sure.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Haaa……Haa……Haa……

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes………Just a little further…………

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …………She's too fast…………

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……You're right.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Maybe I'll finish up for today after all. 
See ya tomorrow.
choice_data_list: Eh? Ah, understood. Good work today —

text_block_list.text:
…Over yonder, distant thunder resounded, 
as if to announce the arrival of the "storm".
